holdings.infoBox: XLRE is an equity ETF with a total of 34 individual holdings. The top holdings are Welltower stock at 10.00%, Prologis at 9.23%, Equinix at 7.04%, American Tower at 5.86%, and Simon Property Group at 4.82%.

overview.description: The State Street Real Estate Select Sector SPDR ETF (XLRE) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P Real Estate Select Sector index, a market-cap-weighted index of REITs and real estate stocks, excluding mortgage REITs, from the S&P 500. XLRE was launched on Oct 7, 2015 and is issued by State Street.
